content: hii can someone help me build a team?
You have very good supports but no good DPS.
But you're early days anyways.
Don't need to worry about building a team until later.
Figure out who you like, play them.

on that dps problem <@334131284655996929> was talking about, the next banner will have: 
Corposant (Aequor)
Helot: Cathena (Caro)
Pollux (Ultra)
All of these are Carries, and enough to carry you through the story if you get 4 copies (the community calls this E3 as in Enlighten 3) of them (4 copies of the same character, not every character once, i need to make this very clear, most of them suck if you do not have 4 copies) which should be very doable if you save up until then while just clearing some story chapters and events combined with the prototype horizon in the sediment shop.

There is also gonna be the new unit Pontos (Aequor), who looks promising as a dps, but is probably gonna need 3 or 4 copies as well.

you have a really solid line up of supports as said before, you could essentially make any carry in the game work with those, except maybe blue 24, you can also test units out in awakener trials found under the records tab in the main Menu

Ita decent. Gameplay is on the turn you will burst stack a lot of shields (playing cards, white stance, etc), apply corrosion using saya and then exalt with sanga.
Also use r wheels and read the beginners handbook

Can anyone improve or give some suggestion on where I can improve my team?
Any improvements on wod

Someone suggested to go this on murphy.

But I am not sure giving up keyflare is wise for retain

- Give Brown / R WoDs to your Supports such as Frenzy, Emerge, Gluttony, Aged, Whisper
- Replace Ryker with Aigis, the 1 Turn Stun is indispensable for GHelot
- Look towards obtaining more Enlightenments for GHelot, ideally E2-3 to solve some consistency issues and raise potential Damage Output 
- Thais E2 for the Cost Reduction in Card Duping from her Exalt are also really great
I'd look into obtaining an Elevated Focus as well, Brown / R WoDs on your Supports is also really handy for Arc 1
Like the blue stone wod substitutes e1 murphy as it adds retain to her 3 cost card
But we lose keyflare for it

Yeah, I know

Just saying that if you want straight Keyflare Stat, you can go for Elevated Focus and obtain some Aliemus as a nice plus

Or if you want to generate Aliemus after every Battle, Aged is the way to go as it gives you a straight 1000
